input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.2.4
            TITLE: each of the above members may be multiple or bent tubes provided the requirements of f.5.2

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.2.4: Each of the above members may be multiple or bent tubes provided the requirements of F.5.2
F.6.2.4 Each of the above members may be multiple or bent tubes provided the requirements of F.5.2 
are met.

final_answer: Each of the above members may be multiple or bent tubes provided the requirements of F.5.2 are met.
